title: チーム＜ファースト＞の宣戦布告

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm preparing for the Unity Cup
finals, I receive a visit from Little Cocon in my
office.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: ...Listen.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
If we end up running against your team during the
finals...

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
Those girls had better run like they mean it.
There's no point running against a team if they
don't put up a proper fight.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: That's all. Bye.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what a coincidence! Did you come to
declare war on them too?

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: What?! A-as if I'd do such a thing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After listening to Little Cocon and Bitter Glasse's
challenge...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
<chrname> seems a little more fired
up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our team is fired up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The team's passionate focus on Speed has had a
positive effect on <chrname>!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our team is fired up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The team's passionate focus on Stamina has had a
positive effect on <chrname>!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our team is fired up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The team's passionate focus on Power has had a
positive effect on <chrname>!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our team is fired up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The team's passionate focus on Guts has had a

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our team is fired up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The team's passionate focus on Wit has had a
positive effect on <chrname>!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our team is fired up!
